title: Protein Packed Rice Krispie Treats
excerpt: Take a bite of my healthy take on the classic rice krispy treat - date-sweetened, protein-packed, and built to fuel you.

title: Essential Egg Replacements for Vegan Baking
excerpt: Eggs do three jobs in baking - binding, moisture, and leavening. The key to veganizing a recipe is knowing what you're replacing.

title: Gut-Healthy Postbiotics With Fermented Beets
excerpt: Learn what ferments can do for your gut, plus an easy beet recipe to get started.

title: Starter Guide to Gluten-Free Flours
excerpt: Gluten-free flours aren't one-to-one swaps for wheat. A starter guide to the flours we use most — what each does, when to reach for it, and a sample blend to get you started.

title: Binders For Better Gluten-Free Baking
excerpt: If you're baking without gluten, adding binders is essential. We're taking you through what they all do and when and how to use each.

title: Choosing the Right Oils for Healthier Baking
excerpt: A baker's guide to oils — choosing not just for taste but for health, quality, and performance.

title: Scoby Secrets: Making Kombucha at Home
excerpt: How to brew tangy, fizzy kombucha at home — what a scoby is, what it does, and the two-stage fermentation that turns sweet tea into a probiotic drink.

title: Stop Throwing Your Toppings In. There's a Better Way.
excerpt: If your blueberries pool at the bottom and your chocolate chips streak the batter, you're mixing them in wrong. Four fixes from a commercial bakery kitchen.

title: The Perfect Cold Brew
excerpt: Cold brew has a reputation for being difficult. It isn't. The process is mostly waiting — but a few small decisions early on make the difference between smooth and bitter.
